lead: Two quick checks stand between your CV and a real conversation. Here's how far yours gets.
assetTitle: And here's what they never reach at all
closerStalls: Why it stalls before someone reads it
bridgeThrough: Both checks let your CV through — further than most get. What wins the interview now is the closer read, and how well the CV is shaped to each specific job. On that closer read:
bridgeStalls: Your CV is getting filtered out before a person properly reads it — so that comes first. Here is what a closer read also turns up:
rewriteSub: One real line from your CV, rewritten:
fixesNote: The fixes come with the full rewrite.
questionsMany: A couple of questions before the rewrite
